character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A seafaring man who frequents the Admiral Benbow Inn, avoids other seafarers, and is feared for his stories and drunken outbursts. He wears patched clothing and keeps a sea-chest.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician who visits the inn to see my father, described as neat and polite.

character_dossiers.name: my father
character_dossiers.biography: Owner of the Admiral Benbow Inn, troubled by the captain's presence and eventually succumbing to illness.
